title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Jayabheri Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Jayabheri Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
